title: elytrigia intermedia subsp. campestris
intro: Elytrigia intermedia subsp. campestris, also known as intermediate wheatgrass or timothy grass, is a type of perennial grass native to Europe and Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Elytrigia intermedia subsp. campestris include reducing stress, improving sleep quality, and acting as a natural antacid. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, tinctures, and extracts, which can be used to support overall well-being and alleviate digestive issues.
